title: The Gatekeeper's Ledger
strategies: reject everyone: zero risk, zero revenue -- reproduces the evaluator's weak (0.1) baseline

per-applicant Bayes-optimal expected-value threshold: approve iff P(legit | score, current mix health) clears today's break-even bar implied by trust/costs, recomputed each round from the current state alone

short-horizon rollout / lookahead planning: project several candidate acceptance bars forward under the public dynamics, detect when continuing today's break-even bar would push mix health below the cascade threshold within the lookahead window, and preemptively tighten (trading immediate expected value for avoiding the reputation-spiral regime) -- then relax back once the danger has passed
full dynamic-programming / value-iteration over the discretized (mix health, trust, volume, spiral) state space for a provably-optimal policy
